---
title: "Publications"
jupyter: python3
execute:
  freeze: false
---

:::: {.publications}


```{python}
#| output: true
#| echo: false

from parse_publications import render_year_section, KEYS_BY_YEAR
from IPython.display import HTML

elements = []

for year in sorted(KEYS_BY_YEAR.keys(), reverse=True):
    elements.append(render_year_section(year))

html = "\n".join([e.render() for e in elements])
HTML(html)
```

:::
